name_en: PETIT FLOT MINI is a refined mini version of the PETIT FLOT PM. Lightweight and compact, it retains the iconic bucket silhouette. The exquisite leather shoulder strap allows for easy switching between handbag, shoulder bag, and crossbody styles, showcasing its practical and versatile nature.
name_cn:
PETIT FLOT MINI is a refined mini version of the PETIT FLOT PM. Lightweight and compact, it retains the iconic bucket silhouette. The exquisite leather shoulder strap allows for easy switching between handbag, shoulder bag, and crossbody styles, showcasing its practical and versatile nature.
size:12×10×17.5cm
🔍020251
